sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 64:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 64:1
items.html: After the two Heys were connected in the screen, it was called Mayin Nukvin. It is named after the Nukvin [females] that connected in it, namely Bina and Malchut. (Inner Light, Item 6)
